title: WidgetCenter reloads after read and refresh
description: Call WidgetCenter.shared.reloadTimelines(ofKind: "AggregatorRadarWidget") in two places: (1) in ArticleReadStore (or the APIClient call site for POST /articles/{id}/read) after an article is successfully marked read, so unread-important items that were read drop off on the next widget reload; (2) after a foreground data refresh completes, so the widget freshens sooner than the background budget alone allows. Import WidgetKit only in the files that need it.
acceptance_criteria: reloadTimelines(ofKind: "AggregatorRadarWidget") called after foreground refresh completion
Kind string matches AggregatorWidgetBundle exactly (no typo)
WidgetKit import added only to the two call-site files
